---
title: "Teaching"
title-block-banner: false
---

I teach courses related to data analysis and labour economics

## Instructor

**Statistical Techniques for Social Research**. Bachelor in Political Science (UB). 2024/2025. Instructor. \[[syllabus](https://www.ub.edu/pladocent/?cod_giga=362524&curs=2023&idioma=ENG)\], \[[schedule](https://drive.google.com/file/d/12gJMYPeCHomMGlt7t5fLbncNk18Hsd1V/view?usp=sharing)\].

**Comparative Employment Policies in the European Union**. Master in Social Policy, Employment and Welfare (UAB). 2025/2026, 2024/2025. Co-instructor (2 lectures). \[[syllabus](https://guies.uab.cat/guies_docents/public/portal/html/2024/assignatura/44037/en)\].

**Evaluation techniques for qualitative data**. Specialization Diploma in Evaluation of Labour Market Policies (UB). 2024/2025, 2023/2024. Co-instructor (2 lectures). \[[slides](https://osf.io/9y3vx)\].


## Teaching assistant

**Multivariable Data Analysis**. Bachelor in Sociology (UAB). 2023/2024. \[[syllabus](https://guies.uab.cat/guies_docents/public/portal/html/2023/assignatura/101148/en)\].

**Data Analysis**. Bachelor in Criminology (UAB). 2022/2023, 2021/2022, 2020/2021.\[[syllabus](https://guies.uab.cat/guies_docents/public/portal/html/2022/assignatura/100452/en)\].
